problem_statement: Implement digitalRoot(value, base) in js/droot.js. Write the non-negative integer value in the given base, sum its digits, and repeat on the sum until a single base-digit remains; return that digit's numeric value as a plain number between 0 and base-1. Zero has digital root zero in every base, and any value already below the base is its own root; for example digitalRoot(255, 16) is 15. Throw a RangeError when value is negative or fractional, or when base is not an integer between 2 and 36 inclusive. Verify with bun test tests/js/droot.
